person.name: Christiana
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Christiana

Christiana was married to Henry Luvel.

On 25 August, 1218, the bishop of Bath and Glastonbury gave the king a palfrey for having license to marry Christiana who was the wife of Henry Luvel.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: Christiana was born in 1159, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary. She died about 1254, at the age of 96.

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana(은)는 1159년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1254년 96세의 나이로 사망했다.
